meta.title: BUZZ ALDRIN is being promoted to GENERAL
meta.description:
The U.S. Air Force just announced that they're giving famed Apollo 11 astronaut Buzz Aldrin an honorary promotion to brigadier general. 

If that surprises you, let's talk about some other things Aldrin's done that might surprise you as well! 

#nasa #space #apollo11 #buzzaldrin #saturn5 #moonlanding #airpower #aviation #militaryhistory #fighterpilot #short #shorts
